claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Anyword closes the feedback loop for any AI model or application, adding A/B-tested data at every step of the generation process.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage contains a link labeled 'Pricing'.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The homepage includes a link to the 'Help Center' which typically contains documentation accessible without login.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Connect your tech stack to Anyword and go from Gen-AI to Gen-AI that drives results.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Anyword meets SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, and HIPAA requirements — ensuring your data and content are protected at every step.
